summary: Iteration 15: Successfully tested PDF Import (convert-to-html) feature and Document Actions responsive layout fix. All 13 backend tests and 33 frontend tests passed.

test_results.frontend: 100% (33/33 Playwright tests passed across 5 spec files)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test PDF document (doc_71438fad9dc7) for PDF conversion testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Document actions (view, move, delete) are visible on narrow screens (375px-768px) with stacked layout, 2) Dropdown menu shows move and delete options correctly, 3) PDF to HTML conversion API works and returns formatted HTML via pymupdf4llm, 4) 'In Artikel umwandeln' button in document preview navigates to article editor with pre-filled content from PDF, 5) Article editor receives PDF content via sessionStorage (pdf_import_data) with title and HTML content.

P1_responsive_document_actions.notes: Document view/actions buttons visible on 375px and 768px viewports. Layout uses stacked rows for narrow screens ensuring buttons never get hidden.

P1_document_actions_dropdown.notes: Three-dot menu opens dropdown with 'In Ordner verschieben' and 'Löschen' options. Both open appropriate dialogs.

P1_pdf_to_html_api.notes: GET /api/documents/{document_id}/convert-to-html returns success=true with html_content using pymupdf4llm for markdown extraction and markdown library for HTML conversion.

P1_pdf_import_flow.notes: Full flow tested: Document preview -> Click 'In Artikel umwandeln' -> Navigate to /articles/new?from_pdf=true -> Article editor loads with PDF title and HTML content pre-filled.

existing_mention_feature.notes: @ mention dropdown still works - updated test to use different search query for reliability

existing_category_tree.notes: Category tree, collapsible folders, and multi-category selection all still working

api_tests_performed.pdf_convert_success: GET /api/documents/{id}/convert-to-html - Returns formatted HTML with success=true
api_tests_performed.pdf_convert_styling: HTML output includes styled tags (style= and class= attributes) for TipTap compatibility
api_tests_performed.pdf_convert_404: Non-existent document returns 404 with error detail
api_tests_performed.document_listing: GET /api/documents - Returns list with document_id, filename, status
api_tests_performed.document_folders: GET /api/document-folders - Returns folder list with hierarchy support

ui_tests_performed.mobile_layout: Folder panel collapses on mobile, documents list takes full width
ui_tests_performed.desktop_layout: Folder tree sidebar visible on desktop (1280px+)
ui_tests_performed.dropdown_menu: Three-dot menu opens with move and delete options
ui_tests_performed.move_dialog: Move dialog shows folder selector with tree hierarchy
ui_tests_performed.delete_dialog: Delete confirmation dialog appears before soft-delete
ui_tests_performed.pdf_preview_convert_btn: 'In Artikel umwandeln' button visible in document preview dialog
ui_tests_performed.pdf_import_to_editor: Clicking convert navigates to editor with PDF content pre-filled
